teaching.role: Teaching Assistant, Organic Chemistry I & Lab
teaching.description: Mentored 120+ undergraduates; developed supplemental materials improving exam performance by 15%.

summary: PhD chemist/materials scientist with 6+ years in analytical characterization, molecular structure-property analysis, and reproducible experimental workflows (LC-MS/GC-MS, NMR, GPC/SEC, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA/DSC, QCM-D). Currently leading DOE-guided process development for bio-based polymer systems and translating analytical data into material-quality specifications.

bullets: Lead analytical characterization and DOE-guided process development for bio-based polymer systems, converting material-quality data into reproducible process windows and scale-up specifications.
Designed and characterized organic molecular materials, mapping structure, purity, and stability across 15+ variants with NMR/GPC, MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, thermal analysis, and electrochemistry.
Drove AFOSR-funded thin-film coating process development, linking deposition conditions to morphology, interface quality, and optical performance through characterization-driven iteration.
Optimized CVD polymer thin-film deposition using DOE and in-situ QCM-D monitoring, establishing process controls from real-time analytical readouts.
Managed characterization/process-development lab operations for a 15-member group; implemented calibration, SOP, and safety systems that improved instrument uptime by 30%.

projects.title: Analytical Characterization & Stability
projects.description: Connected molecular identity, purity, degradation behavior, and performance using orthogonal spectroscopy, electrochemistry, chromatography, MS, and thermal methods.
projects.tech: NMR, GPC, MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, CV, TGA/DSC

projects.title: Bio-Based Polymer Scale-Up Controls
projects.description: Built analytical readouts and material-quality specifications for reproducible polymer process development.
projects.tech: DOE, SPC, polymer characterization, technical reports

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Thin-Film Coatings
projects.description: Established process-property relationships for CVD/surface-preparation workflows and reproducible thin-film conditions.
projects.tech: CVD, QCM-D, surface prep, thin films

skills.Analytical Characterization: LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR, GPC/SEC, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA, DSC, QCM-D, cyclic voltammetry
skills.Molecular & Materials Analysis: Small-molecule materials, polymers, purity assessment, stability analysis, structure-property relationships
skills.Process & Quality: DOE, SPC, method troubleshooting, reproducibility studies, SOPs, technical reports, data integrity
skills.Statistical & Data: JMP (basic), Python (basic), Excel, structured experimental records, trend analysis
skills.Materials: Organic/organometallic materials, thin films, bio-based polymers, CVD coatings
